block_01: Regardless of your preferences in trading, there are several universal rules that apply to absolutely every asset. You can implement them on Binary options, Forex, Stocks, Crypto – any trading instrument that you like.
block_02: For instance, one of these rules is using Fundamental analysis – checking the news about the asset before you trade. This will be beneficial regardless of the instrument and we explain why. There are 3 other things that you need to learn to do every time you trade.
block_03: Check the full article to find out about the most important set of rules for trading.
